articles.title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
articles.description:
The best of what's new streaming on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max, Disney Plus, and more.

The post 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Discover five new streaming titles available on major platforms like Netflix and Hulu.
Includes popular shows and movies released as of July 10, 2026.
Local residents can enjoy diverse entertainment options from home this summer.

articles.title: A 4th Red Sox player has been named a 2026 MLB All-Star
articles.description:
Ceddanne Rafaela was selected to the squad to replace the injured Aaron Judge.

The post A 4th Red Sox player has been named a 2026 MLB All-Star appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ceddanne Rafaela joins the 2026 MLB All-Star team as a replacement for Aaron Judge.
This marks the fourth Red Sox player selected for the All-Star game this year.
Rafaela's selection boosts local excitement and pride for Boston's baseball community.

articles.title: Joey Chestnut to compete in inaugural Saugus Wing Eating Championship
articles.description:
The world’s top-ranked competitive eater will battle Massachusetts native Geoff Esper and other competitors over Kowloon’s signature chicken wings.

The post Joey Chestnut to compete in inaugural Saugus Wing Eating Championship appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joey Chestnut will compete in the Saugus Wing Eating Championship on July 10, 2026.
Massachusetts native Geoff Esper will also participate in the event at Kowloon.
Local food enthusiasts can enjoy the competition and support local eateries.
